			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:UseCase' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713958045762_677304_1288' name='Transition SysML v1 projects to v2' classifierBehavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945330460_938654_30'>
				<subject xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714400811690_570195_1122'/>
				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945330460_938654_30' name='SysML v1-to-v2 transition'>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714042893852_913425_385' body='Who performs this? maybe some expert or 3rd party? '>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945482186_170553_73'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015802087_397267_1414' body='&lt;html&gt;&#10;  &lt;head&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;style&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&#9;p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;/style&gt;&#10;&#9;&lt;/head&gt;&#10;  &lt;body&gt;&#10;&lt;a href=&quot;https://www.omgwiki.org/MBSE/doku.php?id=mbse:sysml_v2_transition:sysml_v1_to_sysml_v2_transition_guidance&quot;&gt;https://www.omgwiki.org/MBSE/doku.php?id=mbse:sysml_v2_transition:sysml_v1_to_sysml_v2_transition_guidance&lt;/a&gt; &lt;/body&gt;&#10;&lt;/html&gt;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015787846_945743_1397'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715266763470_421805_2992' body='&lt;html&gt;&#10;  &lt;head&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;style&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&#9;p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;/style&gt;&#10;&#9;&lt;/head&gt;&#10;  &lt;body&gt;&#10;&lt;b&gt;Migration flavors:     &#10;&lt;/b&gt;&lt;br&gt;&#10;    &lt;div class=&quot;flex max-w-full flex-col gap-4 grow&quot;&gt;&#10;      &lt;div data-message-author-role=&quot;assistant&quot; data-message-id=&quot;72dc5618-16d8-405e-ac88-5e0df622bc86&quot; dir=&quot;auto&quot; data-message-model-slug=&quot;gpt-5-5&quot; class=&quot;min-h-8 text-message relative flex w-full flex-col items-end gap-2 text-start break-words whitespace-normal outline-none keyboard-focused:focus-ring [.text-message+&amp;amp;]:mt-1&quot; data-turn-start-message=&quot;true&quot; tabindex=&quot;0&quot;&gt;&#10;        &lt;div class=&quot;flex w-full flex-col gap-1 empty:hidden&quot;&gt;&#10;          &lt;div class=&quot;markdown prose dark:prose-invert wrap-break-word w-full light markdown-new-styling&quot;&gt;&#10;            &lt;p&gt;&#10;&amp;#160;&#10;&#10;            &lt;/p&gt;&#10;&#10;            &lt;ul data-start=&quot;23&quot; data-end=&quot;274&quot; data-is-only-node=&quot;&quot; data-is-last-node=&quot;&quot;&gt;&#10;              &lt;li&gt;&#10;&lt;strong data-start=&quot;25&quot; data-end=&quot;37&quot;&gt;One-off:&lt;/strong&gt; the source does not evolve. It is pre-processed, transformed into the target, and then only the target continues to evolve.&#10;&#10;              &lt;/li&gt;&#10;              &lt;li data-section-id=&quot;17j2qen&quot; data-start=&quot;23&quot; data-end=&quot;161&quot;&gt;&#10;&lt;strong data-start=&quot;165&quot; data-end=&quot;181&quot;&gt;Incremental:&lt;/strong&gt; the source may continue to evolve and may need to be migrated in stages or chunks.&#10;&#10;              &lt;/li&gt;&#10;            &lt;/ul&gt;&#10;          &lt;/div&gt;&#10;        &lt;/div&gt;&#10;      &lt;/div&gt;&#10;    &lt;/div&gt;&#10;    &lt;div class=&quot;z-0 flex min-h-[46px] justify-start&quot;&gt;&#10;&#10;    &lt;/div&gt;&#10;&lt;/body&gt;&#10;&lt;/html&gt;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871863032_150198_18806'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715266973731_759336_3051' body='Tomas V to update'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_1_32e0130_1714467198296_375806_517'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>

					<edge xmi:type='uml:ControlFlow' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714479253360_748711_3188' visibility='public' source='_2024x_2a6010b_1713958171303_475130_1444' target='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015787846_945743_1397'>

					<edge xmi:type='uml:ControlFlow' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2e60112_1776770680867_323745_18522' visibility='public' source='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015787846_945743_1397' target='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871863032_150198_18806'>

					</edge>
					<node xmi:type='uml:InitialNode' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713958171303_475130_1444' visibility='public'/>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015787846_945743_1397' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779630481256_426196_18523'/>
					<node xmi:type='uml:StructuredActivityNode' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871863032_150198_18806' name='Deploy MBSE with SysML v2 to programs' visibility='public'>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871881116_58708_18807' body='Deploying MBSE with SysML v2 to a program should address the deployment considerations described previously. The program stakeholders must be involved in the decision and support the decision for this to be successful. The organization transition/improvement team should assist the program by providing the organizational infrastructure and technical support.&#10;&#10;The program stakeholders include the systems modeling team as well as other engineering disciplines who interpret and interact with the model. The stakeholders can cross organizational boundaries between acquirers and suppliers. For example, the stakeholders for a DoD acquisition program include both the government and contractor systems modeling teams.&#10;&#10;A plan for implementing MBSE with SysML v2 should be developed for each selected program. This includes establishing the modeling objectives and scope, tailoring the reference methodology, setting up the modeling environment, staffing and training the team in the language, methodology, and tools, and identifying the key modeling artifacts and their required maturity at each program milestone.&#10;&#10;The modeling environment can leverage the organizational modeling environment but will need to be further adapted to meet the needs of the specific program. This includes additional integration with additional specialized tools and data repositories, and integration with the environment for both the acquirer and other subcontractors and suppliers. This also includes integration with the organizational product life cycle management environments to enable configuration management of the different engineering and management artifacts (e.g., the digital thread).&#10;&#10;Different levels of training may be required for different roles. For example, a systems modeler who is developing the model will require more in-depth training than other engineering disciplines who may interpret and interact with the model. A task lead may require a different level of training to understand expectations from the model and properly task the effort.&#10;&#10;The SysML v2 model will either be converted from the SysML v1 model (refer to the SysML v1 to SysML v2 model conversion process) or it will be developed as a new model that leverages the SysML v1 model as an input. The updated methodology and tools will be used to evolve the SysML v2 model.&#10;&#10;2.6.1 Monitor the Improvements&#10;The organization and the program should monitor the results of the transition to SysML v2. Key metrics should include productivity and quality metrics that address the needs of the current program and provide inputs for future cost estimating, and other typical systems engineering metrics (e.g., requirements satisfaction, technical performance measures). This information can be used to refine and update the organizational infrastructure.&#10;&#10;Lessons learned and program successes should also be captured to provide inputs for improving the modeling infrastructure and sharing this information across the organization.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871863032_150198_18806'/>
						</ownedComment>
						<edge xmi:type='uml:ControlFlow' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945567659_668799_127' visibility='public' source='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945494931_61030_87' target='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945508306_26476_101'>
							<weight xmi:type='uml:LiteralUnlimitedNatural' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945567677_99032_128' value='1'/>

						<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945494931_61030_87' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1714028075935_983973_3022'/>
						<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945482186_170553_73' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962101966_240376_2428'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962297190_672083_2599' body='By following this action, the transition from SysML v1 to v2 can be successfully completed, resulting in a conformant SysML v2 model.'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945482186_170553_73'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>
						<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945467007_320011_59' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945916298_830346_140'>
							<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946284359_23054_391' body='Pre-processing phase can effectively prepare the SysML v1 model for transformation to SysML v2.'>
								<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945467007_320011_59'/>
							</ownedComment>
						</node>
						<node xmi:type='uml:ActivityFinalNode' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962341629_774455_2622' visibility='public'/>

						<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_1_32e0130_1714467198296_375806_517' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1714478367431_73723_2830'/>
					</node>
				</ownedBehavior>
				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713957914748_779270_1162' name='Reorganize the model and project usages into a branch'/>
				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713945916298_830346_140' name='Pre-process the SysML v1 model'>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714481208903_865547_3567'/>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714481208907_600109_3573'/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713947086706_259785_491' body='Some parts of the model may no longer be maintained or relevant and they should be removed first thing during the process.'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946998775_900783_470'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714041114495_970540_179' body='After transition SysML v1 model should no longer be edited!!! '>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713959387369_894790_1834'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714041291800_24459_205' body='Example: Requirements diagram can be transofmed to requirements tables.&#10;&#10;However, if there is a table with complex criteria, it might be also very difficult it to migrate to sysml2. '/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715365312459_195443_8032' body='Mostly manual process with very little automation'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713948213887_397190_734'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_2_4060172_1775827067402_300275_18592' body='Each top‑level package in the SysML v1 model shall correspond to a future SysML v2 namespace.&#10;The model shall be reorganized so that each such package contains no more than 5,000 elements.'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2e60112_1776770796715_522278_18529'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2e60112_1776770796715_522278_18529' body='padaryti inside actiona'/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779101221971_506393_18540' body='A disciplined configuration management process is essential for effective reuse'/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779633764140_295373_18672' body='The strategy and plan should be coordinated with the sponsor of the transition effort and other primary stakeholders and should be communicated broadly.'/>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
						<modelExtension>

					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946093103_816503_172' name='Understand tool capabilities and limitations' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>

						</xmi:Extension>

						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946126391_384284_185' body='Assess the modeling tool&#39;s capability for transformation and its limitations.'>

						</ownedComment>
					</node>

						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>

						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946142953_103618_204' body='Verify that the SysML v1 model conforms to the SysML v1 specification.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946129616_905298_189'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946145287_43121_208' name='Remove tool-specific extensions' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714481208907_600109_3573'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946155399_931194_223' body='Remove any tool-specific extensions and other customizations that are not part of the standard SysML v1 specification.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946145287_43121_208'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946157879_471992_227' name='Retain stereotypes and profiles' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714481208907_600109_3573'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946168722_318354_241' body='Ensure that the use of stereotypes and profiles in the SysML v1 model is retained, as they are expected to be supported in the transformation process.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946157879_471992_227'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946174327_921691_245' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1713949693846_199975_860'>

						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946182657_378695_259' body='Identify and handle features of SysML v1 not supported in SysML v2, such as adjunct properties. This may involve removing these elements or assessing their impact on the transformation.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713946174327_921691_245'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>

						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715356125570_896972_7905' body='2 cases:&#10;1. All elements need to have names. Unnamed elements in the SysML v2 model cannot be rendered in textual syntax.&#10;2. No duplicate names in the same namespace. The reason for this is again the same - inability to render in SysML v2 textual syntax after trasnformation.'>

						</ownedComment>

				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713949693846_199975_860' name='Handle unsupported features'>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714482710696_751324_4179'/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714041514246_948811_240' body='Some references between elements may not be supported, not just the elements themselves. Additionally, some relationships between elements may not be supported.&#10;&#10;Tables with complex criteria may not be migrated and should be marked as unsupported.&#10;&#10;Scripts may not always be migrated automatically. Areas that rely on scripts should be marked as unsupported elements, and their migration to SysML v2 may need to be handled manually.'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713949696651_882717_888'/>
					</ownedComment>

				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962101966_240376_2428' name='Transform the SysML v1 model to a SysML v2 model'>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013824996_675832_298'/>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013825004_30242_304'/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714027813868_476396_2988' body='This action should generate a report of what was not transformed.&#10;&#10;For example, more than 50 action types in SysML v1 need to be manually modeled as expressions in SysML v2 during post-processing.&#10;&#10;Scripts are very unlikely to be transformed.&#10;&#10;DSL transformation is achieved through mappings between profiles and metadata/libraries.&#10;&#10;The transformed model will not simulate automatically without significant adjustments and refactoring.'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962183092_47931_2538'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715269986964_80001_3300' body='Tomas tbd'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715269971280_333809_3284'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715369646495_580298_8234' body='that&#39;s a management decision whether or not to do that. Probably a project manager should make that decision.&#10;&#10;maybe it should belong to some sort of parallel management activity'/>
					<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
						<modelExtension>
							<ownedDiagram xmi:type='uml:Diagram' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962101964_968772_2427' name='Transform the SysML v1 model to a SysML v2 model' visibility='public' context='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962101966_240376_2428' ownerOfDiagram='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962101966_240376_2428'>
								<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
									<diagramRepresentation>
										<diagram:DiagramRepresentationObject ID='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962101978_26658_2443' initialFrameSizeSet='true' requiredFeature='com.nomagic.magicdraw.plugins.impl.sysml#SysML;MD_customization_for_SysML.mdzip;UML_Standard_Profile.mdzip' type='SysML Activity Diagram' umlType='Activity Diagram' xmi:id='_XS7NUBBuEe-ONfKQnppicg' xmi:version='2.0' xmlns:binary='http://www.nomagic.com/ns/cameo/client/binary/1.0' xmlns:diagram='http://www.nomagic.com/ns/magicdraw/core/diagram/1.0' xmlns:xmi='http://www.omg.org/XMI' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance'>
											<diagramContents contentHash='b604c60aecb3fbdefd170a5c1edd56f41b93e2a8' exporterName='MagicDraw UML' exporterVersion='2026x v2' xmi:id='_XS7NURBuEe-ONfKQnppicg'>
												<binaryObject streamContentID='BINARY-3b5f2985-8d6a-424d-85c5-fae9413ed665' xmi:id='_bV4scBBuEe-ONfKQnppicg' xsi:type='binary:StreamIdentityBinaryObject'/>
												<usedObjects href='#_2024x_2a6010b_1713962183092_47931_2538'/>
												<usedObjects href='#_2026x_2_2e60112_1779799821423_237989_18642'/>
												<usedObjects href='#_2026x_2_2e60112_1779799911512_320261_18651'/>

					<node xmi:type='uml:InitialNode' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962105270_925770_2456' visibility='public'>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013824996_675832_298'/>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962106628_959665_2464' name='Select transformation tool conformant to SysML v1-to-v2 Transformation spec' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013824996_675832_298'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962123226_872437_2480' body='Choose a tool capable of executing the standard SysML v1 to SysML v2 transformation specification.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962106628_959665_2464'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962161639_841904_2520' name='Transform all supported elements' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013825004_30242_304'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962180066_918068_2534' body='Follow the rules outlined in the SysML v1 to v2 transformation specification for transforming each type of element and handling cases where no direct correspondence exists.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962161639_841904_2520'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962183092_47931_2538' name='Transform elements that do not map to SysML v2' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013825004_30242_304'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962226209_883387_2552' body='Handle situations where there are no corresponding elements in SysML v2 for features present in SysML v1, as per the rules specified in the transformation specification.&#10;&#10;The SysML v1 to v2 transformation specification defines the rules for transforming each kind of element in SysML v1 to a corresponding element in SysML v2. The transformation also includes rules for cases where there is no corresponding SysML v2 element. For example, a block in SysML v1 includes a meta property called &#39;isEncapsulated&#39;. There is no equivalent concept in SysML v2 since the SysML v2 language designers did not see a need for this. However, there is a rule for how to address this in the transformation.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962183092_47931_2538'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962240583_668776_2556' name='Handle validation errors and warnings' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013824996_675832_298'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962251396_929238_2571' body='Interpret validation errors and warnings generated during the transformation process and address any issues encountered.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962240583_668776_2556'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962263109_822411_2575' name='Inspect manually' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013824996_675832_298'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962270260_193106_2589' body='Perform a manual comparison between the transformed SysML v2 model and the original SysML v1 model to ensure accuracy and completeness of the transformation.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962263109_822411_2575'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:ActivityFinalNode' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713962397566_999146_2669' visibility='public'>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715013824996_675832_298'/>
					</node>

						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>

					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015202230_219850_1036' name='Validate model accuracy' visibility='public'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715197368956_20923_1662'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015210266_316177_1054' body='Ensure that the SysML v2 model accurately represents the intent of the SysML v1 model.'>

						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015218230_258482_1072' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015323752_737163_1120'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715197368956_20923_1662'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015228658_288758_1086' body='Conduct a thorough comparison between the SysML v1 and v2 models, focusing on key aspects such as system hierarchy and selected views.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015218230_258482_1072'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015384630_306696_1210' name='Compare execution and analysis results' visibility='public'>

							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715197368956_20923_1662'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015400765_602177_1228' body='Compare execution and analysis results obtained from the SysML v2 model with those from the SysML v1 model to aid in validation.&#10;Keep in mind that SysML v2 execution semantics are still being specified, which may affect the comparison process.&#10;'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1715015384630_306696_1210'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>

				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1715263052496_152465_2824' name='Rewrite SysML v1 tool extensions and discipline tool integrations'/>
				<ownedBehavior xmi:type='uml:Activity' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779630481256_426196_18523' name='Prepare organization for transition'>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207482_167873_18630'/>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631'/>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207490_92854_18632'/>
					<partition xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832'/>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870701418_436385_18782' body='Typical pilot projects may address one or more of the following pilot objectives:&#10;&#10;1. Increase awareness of the SysML v2 Modeling Language and its differences with SysML v1&#10;2. Learn the SysML v2 Modeling Language and build the workforce skill base&#10;3. Evaluate current SysML v1 models to define criteria and assess there suitability for model conversion&#10;4. Establish approach for converting SysML v1 models to SysML v2 models&#10;5. Pre-process SysML v1 models to position them for successful transformation to SysML v2&#10;6. Evaluate and recommend changes to existing methodology&#10;7. Evaluate tools as they become available&#10;8. Evaluate current customizations, integrations, plugins etc. and strategize their migration to SysML v2&#10;9. Establish metrics to help manage the transition process and evaluate improvements&#10;&#10;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631507367_338_18555'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779881579126_699732_18875' body='Plugins, reports, potentially scripts'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2024x_2a6010b_1714479161812_674260_3124'/>
					</ownedComment>
					<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779882467590_29441_18877' body='&lt;html&gt;&#10;  &lt;head&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;style&gt;&#10;&#9;&#9;&#9;p {padding:0px; margin:0px;}&#10;&#9;&#9;&lt;/style&gt;&#10;&#9;&lt;/head&gt;&#10;  &lt;body&gt;&#10;Reusable assets include SysML v1 profiles and conversion of these assets to SysML v2 libraries&lt;/body&gt;&#10;&lt;/html&gt;'>
						<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871464060_296883_18798'/>
					</ownedComment>

					<group xmi:type='uml:ActivityPartition' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631' visibility='public' represents='_2024x_2a6010b_1714401489349_62075_1731'>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870985364_615118_18789'/>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871464960_270511_18799'/>

					<group xmi:type='uml:ActivityPartition' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207490_92854_18632' visibility='public' represents='_2024x_2a6010b_1714401006699_986857_1185'>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631563958_375970_18572'/>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779879673317_251774_18810'/>

					<group xmi:type='uml:ActivityPartition' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832' visibility='public' represents='_2024x_2a6010b_1714401489359_500041_1733'>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631230144_9105_18536'/>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631231824_311910_18540'/>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631302696_13198_18546'/>
						<edge xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880315888_106081_18819'/>
						<node xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631165095_698074_18529'/>
						<node xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631216727_191792_18533'/>
						<node xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631193589_280022_18531'/>
						<node xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631507367_338_18555'/>
						<node xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631673518_723573_18613'/>
					</group>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1714479161812_674260_3124' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_2a6010b_1715263052496_152465_2824'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207482_167873_18630'/>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2024x_2a6010b_1713958164737_913892_1430' visibility='public' behavior='_2024x_1_32e0130_1714461486685_945787_43'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207490_92854_18632'/>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:InitialNode' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631165095_698074_18529' visibility='public'>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832'/>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631193589_280022_18531' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632236453_933435_18633'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870105814_308150_18777' body='A transition team should be established to develop and execute the transition strategy and plans. This team should be integrated with other teams that are responsible for related digital engineering initiatives. The team should have the authority and responsibility to implement organizational change and include a team lead with representation from the business units and other parts of the organization that are transitioning to MBSE with SysML v2. The team should include members with the expertise needed to develop and evolve the MBSE infrastructure including the MBSE methodologies, tools, and training including expertise in both SysML v1 and SysML v2.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631193589_280022_18531'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631216727_191792_18533' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632238668_139107_18635'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870195270_198828_18778' body='The strategy should outline the high-level objectives, risks, approach, and key milestones for the transition. The plan should define the activities to develop the incremental modeling infrastructure capabilities based on the priorities and available resources. The plan should identify and allocate resources to the plan. The strategy and plan should be coordinated with the sponsor of the transition effort and other primary stakeholders and should be communicated broadly. The strategy and plan should include nearer-term opportunities to demonstrate early success, along with mid-term and longer-term opportunities. For example, a near-term opportunity may be to demonstrate the value-added capabilities of SysML v2 in a pilot project. A mid-term opportunity may be to demonstrate the ability of a small team on a smaller program to support a successful System Design Review and Preliminary Design Review by establishing the model of the system architecture and requirements flow down. The longer-term opportunity may be to demonstrate that the architecture and more precise requirements reduced the cost of testing and downstream errors. The strategy and plans should include support for both SysML v1 models and SysML v2 models which may co-exist for some time.&#10;2.2.1 Transition Objectives&#10;The objectives are to transition from the current state of systems modeling with SysML v1 to the future state that enables the effective application of MBSE with SysML v2. The value proposition should be compelling and support the broader goals of the organization to improve productivity, quality, agility, and innovation. It should be clear how the organization’s investment is anticipated to yield project improvements.&#10;&#10;2.2.2 Transition Risks&#10;There are risks associated with introducing the new SysML v2 modeling tools and integrations with other tools, changes in methodologies, and a workforce with limited experience using SysML v2. There is also risk associated with transforming the SysML v1 model to the SysML v2 model which could result in significant unanticipated effort and require changes to systems engineering work products. These risks can be mitigated by careful planning. The risks should decrease as the organization gains experience in transitioning to SysML v2.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631216727_191792_18533'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:ForkNode' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631267293_812532_18543' visibility='public'/>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631507367_338_18555' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632345822_692550_18657'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870743748_488217_18783' body='Identify pilot opportunities and provide the needed resources (e.g., funding, schedule, and expertise) to conduct the pilots. The pilots are used to assess the impact of SysML v2 on the organizations MBSE practices including methodology, tools, and training, and validate the proposed changes to the organizations MBSE practices.&#10;&#10;The pilot should have clear objectives and may vary in size and scope. A pilot may focus on assessing the impact on MBSE methodology, on MBSE tools, on integration with other methodologies and tools, or on specific modeling practices including modeling guidelines and patterns, or the approach to converting a SysML v1 model to a SysML v2 model. The results of the pilot assess the impact to current practice and validate the proposed changes to the practice.&#10;&#10;The pilots require an initial modeling environment. The open-source pilot implementation can be used as a starter environment to introduce the team to SysML v2. Specific vendor tools can be used as they become available. The pilot offers an important opportunity to collaborate and provide feedback to the tool vendors.&#10;&#10;The pilot should be staffed with team members that have the appropriate skillset. Initial SysML v2 training should be provided to the team members. The team will require on-going support from one or more individuals with SysML v2 expertise.&#10;&#10;Each pilot activity should include identification and collection of key metrics that can be used by programs such as cost estimating metrics where applicable, and other metrics to track progress and the results of the improvement effort.&#10;&#10;An example pilot project that was conducted to evaluate the application of a model-based systems engineering methodology called Object Oriented Systems Engineering Method (OOSEM) and a supporting tool suite is included in Steiner et al. (2016). Although the pilot was conducted several years ago, the systematic approach to conducting the pilot is still applicable and can serve as a reference for conducting other pilots.&#10;&#10;Other typical pilot projects may address one or more of the following pilot objectives:&#10;&#10;1. Increase awareness of the SysML v2 Modeling Language and its differences with SysML v1&#10;2. Learn the SysML v2 Modeling Language and build the workforce skill base&#10;3. Evaluate current SysML v1 models to define criteria and assess there suitability for model conversion&#10;4. Establish approach for converting SysML v1 models to SysML v2 models&#10;5. Pre-process SysML v1 models to position them for successful transformation to SysML v2&#10;6. Evaluate and recommend changes to existing methodology&#10;7. Evaluate tools as they become available&#10;8. Evaluate current customizations, integrations, plugins etc. and strategize their migration to SysML v2&#10;9. Establish metrics to help manage the transition process and evaluate improvements'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631507367_338_18555'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:JoinNode' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631621049_218544_18593' visibility='public'/>
					<node xmi:type='uml:ActivityFinalNode' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631673518_723573_18613' visibility='public'>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779880615436_574759_18832'/>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870984072_585248_18788' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871000440_242296_18791'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207490_92854_18632'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871107185_356943_18793' body='The selected tool will need to be integrated into the overall modeling environment that often includes many other kinds of tools including requirements management, analysis, hardware and software design, testing, and project management tools. This integration is typically done incrementally based on the workflow priorities.&#10;&#10;In addition, there will be SysML v1 modeling tool extensions such as plugins and scripts that contain a broad array of customized concepts and functionality. Each extension will need to be assessed to determine if it is needed in SysML v2. Some plugins may be able to be replaced by standard SysML v2 language extensions. Other customizations may leverage the SysML v2 API to develop standardized applications that can interoperate with multiple tools.&#10;&#10;The ability to support modeling in both a classified and unclassified environment should be considered. For example, the unclassified models can be considered project usages that can be used in a classified environment.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870984072_585248_18788'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631523019_314457_18560' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632347950_352601_18659'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779870881478_264849_18784' body='The transition team should conduct an evaluation of the candidate SysML v2 modeling tool vendors. Key criteria for the evaluation may include standards conformance to the language and API, usability, execution capability, visualization capability, documentation, and report generation, configuration and model management, integration with other engineering tools, performance, security, acquisition and maintenance costs, and tool support. Another key criterion is support for converting existing SysML v1 models to SysML v2 models. The selection should be deferred until the practitioners have had hands on experience with the modeling tool in the organization’s environment. As noted previously, the tool evaluation can be part of the pilot projects.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631523019_314457_18560'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631605552_709628_18581' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632351733_289037_18663'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871440182_509574_18796' body='The modeling methodology, practices, tool guidance, and training content can be made available on an organizational repository for broad access and use. This augments the enterprise reuse repository containing reusable model assets. The organizational repository/website must be maintained with easily searchable content to be useful.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631605552_709628_18581'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871464060_296883_18798' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871475616_661420_18801'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871489693_847726_18803' body='As SysML v2 models are developed on programs, the models and updated practices can be evaluated by the organization to assess how these models and practices can be reused across the organization. Reference architectures can be created for each relevant application domain (e.g., UAV, Command and Control System). This is done by creating logical abstractions and/or product lines that can be used as a basis for developing specific design configurations. In addition, component models can be specified, validated, and captured in reuse libraries. The access to the enterprise reuse repository may need to support different classification levels, where classified models can access unclassified models as project usages. A disciplined configuration management process is essential for effective reuse.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871464060_296883_18798'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631306205_908485_18550' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632343814_344218_18655'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871375511_437476_18795' body='A training plan should be established that includes who should be trained and what level of training is required, when they should be trained, and how they should be trained. The level of training will vary from early awareness training across the broad community, to more specific training in the language, methodology, and tools that depend on the role of the person being trained. Just-in-time project-specific training can be tailored to the needs of a project.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631306205_908485_18550'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
					<node xmi:type='uml:CallBehaviorAction' xmi:id='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631580802_725279_18576' visibility='public' behavior='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632349741_529961_18661'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 2026x'>
							<modelExtension/>
						</xmi:Extension>
						<inPartition xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779632207487_381175_18631'/>
						<ownedComment xmi:type='uml:Comment' xmi:id='_2026x_1_2a6010b_1779871227150_283458_18794' body='The results of the pilot projects can be used to update to the modeling practices that includes the modeling guidelines, patterns, and MBSE methodology. The MBSE methodology defines how the organization’s systems engineering process is performed using a model-based approach. The usage focused modeling approach should be considered when updating the methodology. This methodology serves as a reference methodology that programs can adapt and tailor to meet their needs.'>
							<annotatedElement xmi:idref='_2026x_2_2e60112_1779631580802_725279_18576'/>
						</ownedComment>
					</node>
				</ownedBehavior>
